export.example: The country exports a lot of fruit.
export.example_zh: 這個國家出口大量水果。

export.example: Tea is one of their main exports.
export.example_zh: 茶是他們的主要出口品之一。

extreme.example: He goes from one extreme to the other.
extreme.example_zh: 他從一個極端走到另一個極端。

fade.example: The color of the shirt faded in the sun.
fade.example_zh: 襯衫的顏色在陽光下褪了。

faint.example_zh: 我們聽見一陣微弱的聲音。

faint.example: She felt faint in the hot room.
faint.example_zh: 在悶熱的房間裡她覺得快暈倒。

fairy.example: The story is about a kind fairy.
fairy.example_zh: 這故事是關於一位善良的仙女。

faith.example: She has great faith in her friends.
People of different faiths live here.
faith.example_zh: 不同信仰的人住在這裡。

fake.example: The ring turned out to be fake.

familiar.example: His face looks familiar to me.

fancy.example: They ate at a fancy restaurant.
fancy.example_zh: 他們在一家高級餐廳用餐。

fancy.example: Do you fancy a cup of tea?

fare.example: The bus fare went up this year.

farther.example: The store is farther than I thought.

fashionable.example_zh: 她總是穿著時髦的衣服。

fearful.example: The child was fearful of the big dog.

feather.example: A soft feather fell from the bird.
feather.example_zh: 一根柔軟的羽毛從鳥身上掉下。

fence.example: A wooden fence surrounds the garden.

fighter.example: The boxer is a strong fighter.
fighter.example_zh: 這名拳擊手是個強壯的鬥士。

fighter.example: Fighter planes flew over the city.

firework.example: We watched the fireworks on New Year.

fist.example: He held the coin tight in his fist.
fist.example_zh: 他把硬幣緊握在拳頭裡。

flame.example: The candle's flame danced in the wind.

flash.example: A flash of lightning lit the sky.
The lights flashed on and off.

flashlight.example: He used a flashlight in the dark.

flavor.example: This ice cream has a strawberry flavor.

flesh.example: The fruit has sweet, soft flesh.
flesh.example_zh: 這水果的果肉香甜又柔軟。

float.example: The leaf floated on the water.

flock.example: A flock of birds flew south.
Tourists flock to the beach in summer.

flood.example: The heavy rain caused a flood.

flour.example: We need flour to make bread.

foggy.example: It was foggy on the mountain road.

fold.example: There is a fold in the paper.

fond.example: She is fond of her little brother.

forever.example: I will remember this day forever.

fortune.example: He made a fortune from his business.
fortune.example_zh: 他靠生意賺了一大筆錢。

fortune.example: She had the good fortune to meet him.

frank.example: To be frank, I don't like the plan.
frank.example_zh: 老實說，我不喜歡這個計畫。

freezer.example: Keep the ice cream in the freezer.
freezer.example_zh: 把冰淇淋放在冷凍庫裡。

frequent.example: He is a frequent visitor to the library.

fright.example: The loud bang gave me a fright.

fuel.example_zh: 車子需要燃料才能行駛。

fund.example: They raised funds for the school.

fur.example: The cat has soft gray fur.
fur.example_zh: 這隻貓有柔軟的灰色毛。

gallon.example: He bought a gallon of milk.

gamble.example: It is risky to gamble with money.
Starting a business is a gamble.

gang.example: A gang of boys played in the park.

gap.example: There is a gap between the two desks.

garage.example: He parked the car in the garage.
She took her car to the garage.

gasoline-gas.example: The car ran out of gasoline.

geography.example: We study mountains and rivers in geography.
geography.example_zh: 我們在地理課學山脈和河流。

gesture.example: He made a friendly gesture with his hand.
gesture.example_zh: 他用手做了個友善的手勢。

gesture.example: She gestured for us to sit down.

glance.example: She took a quick glance at the clock.

glory.example: The team won glory for the school.
glory.example_zh: 這支隊伍為學校贏得榮耀。

glow.example: The candles glowed in the dark.
There was a warm glow in the sky.
glow.example_zh: 天空有一抹溫暖的光輝。

golf.example: My father plays golf on weekends.
